name: async-dag
description: Open-source DAG engine from ArcPX — pluggable node executor, parallel workflows, GraphEngine({ llm }) for Bedrock/OpenAI

scripts.run:local: npm run build && node examples/run-local.mjs examples/quickstart-pipeline.json
scripts.run:fan-in: npm run build && node examples/run-local.mjs examples/fan-in-pipeline.json
scripts.run:fan-out: npm run build && node examples/run-local.mjs examples/fan-out-pipeline.json
scripts.run:llm: npm run build && node examples/run-with-llm.mjs examples/pipeline-llm-demo.json examples/global-settings.example.json
scripts.run:web-scraper: npm run build && node examples/run-local.mjs examples/web-scraper-pipeline.json
scripts.run:output-chaining: npm run build && node examples/run-with-llm.mjs examples/pipeline-output-chaining.json
